product.title: XCBYT 4-Pack Magnetic Car Window Shades for Camping Privacy - 100% Blackout Side Window Covers (Metal Frames Only) - UV Protection Sun Shade for Baby Sleeping - Universal Fit Automotive Curtains
feature_bullets: METAL FRAMES ONLY: Before buying, test your door frame with a fridge magnet. These car window shades use 14 powerful magnets for steel frames ONLY. Will NOT stick to aluminum, frameless glass(like tesla), or plastic. Check first for a secure fit

100% BLACKOUT: Total privacy instantly: Create a pitch-black space instantly with our dense Nano-Tech fabric. Unlike mesh, these car blackout window covers fully block views. Perfect for car camping, napping, or as window covers for privacy car

99% UV SHIELD: Cooling cabin for baby and pets. Block 99% of UV rays and lower cabin heat. Our car side window shades act as a heat shield, preventing sunburn. Essential window car shades for baby and shade for car window for kids on hot days

UNIVERSAL FIT FOR MOST VEHICLES: Designed to fit most sedans, SUVs, and trucks. Front Shades: 35.4" (Top) x 19.7" (Side). Rear Shades: 31.5" (W) x 19.3" (H). The free-moving magnets allow you to adjust the shape to fit your window curve. Note: Please measure your windows to ensure maximum coverage. Includes 4 pieces for full cabin coverage

REINFORCED 14-MAGNET ADHESION: We’ve upgraded the stability with 14 powerful magnets embedded in both front and rear shades (competitors often use fewer and smaller). They slide smoothly for adjustment and stay firmly in place without blocking the window lift mechanism. You can freely roll the windows up and down to enjoy the breeze while keeping the sun out

local.title: makes me feel safe and gives me privacy
local.text: I am a loser and have been too anxious and shy to eat out alone in public, so I resort to eating in the comfort of my car lol #losercore however, when I eat in my car, students passing by look at me weird. it really messes with my head. I know they most likely don't care, so what? but years of being bullied in elementary and middle school really does numbers to you, and you think people are out to get you. so I purchased these curtains to keep myself more private when I eat alone in my car. it makes me feel safer, and I can enjoy my lunches in peace now!! it's easy to put on and fits my toyota corolla se. it's compact and can be stored in your glove compartment or other car nooks and crannies :-) my only gripe is that the magnets are a bit annoying as they go all over the place. but it doesn't affect its usability at all. awesome purchase for those who also like to eat or maybe even nap in your car between classes
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 6, 2025

local.title: Nice coverage
local.text: Fit perfect on my fiat 500. Windows are covered almost entirely. It has about an inch that isn't covered towards the mirrors but I can live with that
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026

local.title: Blacked Out Completely
local.text: Tiny separate magnets attach to the door to give privacy. The magnets aren't that strong. If you bump them, the whole curtain falls off. They block all sunlight. Even direct light from a flashlight is blocked. Perfect for changing clothes, van life or getting a nap in the backseat. That said, I wouldn't suggest driving with them on. It completely blocks any view out the covered window. They aren't insulated and only attach one way. The magnets are in the "top" half of the curtain. It would be nice if it had magnets all around to seal the bottom of the curtain for night stops.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 25, 2025

local.title: Works great, as long as you get how they work.
local.text: RE: the people saying the magnets are weak... Nope. The magnets are just great. However... they're only at the top. So, if you've got the thing upside-down and are upset that it won't stick... that's on you. RE: the people saying it doesn't fit. Well, no, not perfectly. If you want, you can pay $200 and get some custom fit ones just for your EXACT car. But these are one-size-fits-all, dig? For this incredibly low price, they do exactly what they're supposed to, which is block *most* of the sun/light. And in terms of application technique: these are designed to go on with the door OPEN. You wrap the magnetic part around to the metal part of the door, so that when you close the door, the magnets are inside the gap between door and frame. If you're trying to put them on with the door closed... yeah, that won't work. If they were reflective for sunshine, they'd be perfect and worth 3x. But for this price, they're still pretty amazing.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 6, 2024

local.title: Could be better made
local.text: I purchase this knowing that it's not a car model specific. It was big enough to fit the windows of my '20 rav4. I used these whenever I'm inside the vehicle doing work on my laptop and keep the heat/glare out.3 stars because it's either missing a few magnets and some came off due to the poor stitching.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 18, 2025

local.title: Perfect. quick. simple.
local.text: Perfect. quick. simple. The black interior of my car just soaks in heat. These great little shades are quick to pop in and take down to keep the car cool. I travel with my dog to events and normally have to put a large aluminum net over the car to keep it cool. While some times that might be needed, most of the time, these little curtains will do the trick with much less effort. Bonus is that I can lower a window and place the curtain lower as well so air flows.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 3, 2025

local.title: Make the purchase
local.text: I already have 5% tint on my windows but when I'm using my phone you can see right through at work. I spend most of my time in my car since I'm an on-call truck driver waiting for work. These blackout curtains are amazing and it's even more amazing that they're magnets! 100% recommend. I drive a Chevy Spark so they fit perfect in my little car.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 29, 2025

local.title: Works but annoying
local.text: Works well. Easy to put up and take down. These are literally black out black out curtains. I’m afraid to use sometimes because it hinders my line of view when switching lanes. Just a hassle to have to put on and take off. I should have gotten the ones where you can just push to the side like an actual curtain.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 15, 2025

Un sollievo per i passeggeri posteriori, soprattutto per i bambini.​Qualità/Prezzo Ottimo: Materiale resistente e duraturo.​Un accessorio indispensabile per l'estate. Consigliate a tutti!
